auth-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the modelmapper dependency to version 3.2.6.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to leverage Java 16+ feature.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.after: if (value instanceof String string) { validationErrors.put(key, string); }

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.why_exists: List.getFirst() is a new API introduced in Java 21; using it requires the target JDK to be 21 or higher, but the old code compiles on older JDKs. This is a modernization change, not a fix for a breakage in the old code.
